WARRIOR.label: Warrior
WARRIOR.summary: A frontline bruiser who thrives in prolonged fights with heavy steel and relentless pressure.

THEIF.label: Theif
THEIF.summary: A slippery infiltrator built around speed, positioning, and evasive play over raw toughness.

ROGUE.label: Rogue
ROGUE.summary: A precision striker that balances mobility with burst damage and sharp finishing blows.

BRAWLER.label: Brawler
BRAWLER.summary: A reckless powerhouse that trades finesse for crushing hits and durable armor.
